char_status: Deputy director of 狩灵协会2科

appearance.clothing: White shirt with black tie, brown work vest, a single gold wing-shaped earring on the right ear, white trousers, black ankle boots.
appearance.weapon: 赤旗, a saber forged by 锻心工坊. Ignites crimson flames when infused with 灵力.

char_description.overview: A 狩灵协会2科 deputy director whose tactical mind directs personnel like a chessboard.
char_description.combat_style: Strategically deploys troops for tactical advantage, advancing steadily. Calls unit codes to summon squad members to the field.

char_personality.core_traits: Commander, Upright, Decisive, Stubbornly principled, Protective
char_personality.strengths: Battlefield command, calmness under pressure, tactical versatility.
char_personality.flaws: Inflexible, stubborn, haunted by past command errors that caused serious losses.
char_personality.quirks: Polishes 赤旗 spotless before every operation.

char_background.origin: Rose through 狩灵协会2科 ranks through strategic brilliance. Commissioned a blade from 锻心工坊, now carries it into every operation.
char_background.current_mission: Faithfully fulfill duties, protect people, and maintain public security in the Kansai region.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Premier, vast 灵力 reserves eliminating energy depletion risks entirely.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Premier, discerns subtle 灵力 flow and faint 灵力 traces.
char_basic_abilities.身体素质: Excellent, physical capabilities far surpassing ordinary people.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-一人成军: Summons up to four from a legion (shield, breakthrough, sniper, gunner, rocket, medic) into a tactical squad. Composition adjustable by tactical needs.

char_relationships.红: Her director. Handles every piece of paperwork he ignores. In blood mist, he is the weapon she commands. Has never said out loud that she is why 狩灵协会2科 functions.
char_relationships.静流: Senior colleague in 狩灵协会2科 she once looked up to. Knew her partner, watched them in sync on the field. Has not contacted her since she left, wanting to but never finding words that would not make it worse. An unresolved loss.
char_relationships.风来: The one who commissioned 赤旗 from 铁心 for her promotion. Still remembers the weight of the blade in her hands the first time she held it. A gift that said more than any promotion ceremony ever could.
char_relationships.铁心: Forged 赤旗. She has visited his workshop once since, to thank him in person. He grunted and went back to his forge. She understood.

char_dialogue_examples.response: 赤旗出鞘，火焰顺着刀身腾起三尺，"全体都有，列队。"
她双臂交叠在胸前，金瞳扫过战场上的每一处，下颌微微收紧，"突破手侧翼包抄，机枪兵保持火力压制。"
她大步踏入战场中央，长靴在碎石上碾出脆响，靴跟一转面向那团扭曲的黑影，赤旗横持，刀身焰光压低成一线，"危害人类的恶灵，伏诛吧。"
